verdict: Moderate displacement risk, with some tasks being highly automatable but others requiring human creativity and judgment.

reasoning_steps.title: High routine cognitive tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks like sketching rough and detailed drawings of apparel or accessories, selecting materials and production techniques, and adapting other designers' ideas for the mass market are highly automatable with current LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative judgment required
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks that require human creativity and originality, such as creating new designs or coordinating special products, are less likely to be automated in the near future.

reasoning_steps.title: Stakes of error moderate
reasoning_steps.body: While errors can have significant consequences in fashion design, they are often caught by colleagues or clients, reducing the stakes of error compared to other high-risk professions.

adjacent_careers.name: Fashion Illustrator
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both fashion designers and illustrators require creative judgment and human touch in their work.

adjacent_careers.name: Textile Designer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: While textile design is related to fashion design, it requires more technical expertise and is less likely to be automated.

recent_developments.headline: Generative tools enter mainstream creative pipelines
recent_developments.impact: Studios and agencies use AI for ideation, layout, voice, and music drafts — finals still human-finished.

recent_developments.headline: Stock-image and stock-music markets compress
recent_developments.impact: AI-generated assets are taking share from libraries that once monetized routine creative output.

recent_developments.headline: Provenance standards (C2PA) gain industry backing
recent_developments.impact: Major platforms and cameras commit to content credentials so human-made work can be marked as such.

quotes.quote: I am utterly disgusted. This is an insult to life itself.
quotes.speaker: Hayao Miyazaki
quotes.title: Co-founder, Studio Ghibli

quotes.quote: AI is a tool. It will not replace artists. It will replace artists who do not learn to use AI as a tool.
quotes.speaker: Refik Anadol
quotes.title: Media artist

quotes.quote: Generative tools collapse the cost of producing a draft to near zero. The differentiator becomes taste, judgment, and knowing what is worth making at all.
quotes.speaker: John Maeda
quotes.title: Designer; VP of Design and AI, Microsoft
